postReview.title: Inter Miami 3-4 FC Dallas: Mascherano rests star names as unbeaten start comes to a halt
postReview.description: Lionel Messi and his fellow star players did not feature for Inter Miami as Javier Mascherano's team suffered their first MLS loss.

QAData.question: Who won between Inter Miami CF and FC Dallas on Sun, 27 Apr 2025 21:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: FC Dallas won 4–3 over Inter Miami CF on Sun, 27 Apr 2025 21:00:00 GMT.
